description: Style NoteUpdated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of shoes exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both!Product DescriptionBlue and white synthetic ballet flat style upper with a velcro closure on the heel collarPadded fabric inner with perforationsRubber outsole with an upraised heel and floral lugs all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
